scope.summary: Build the first premium, responsive resume and project portfolio landing page from the approved resume content and public-safe assets, ready for GitHub Pages.
exclusions: No framework, bundler, backend, database, analytics, tracking, paid service, custom domain, or image generation
No private or unsanitized client material
No claim that the current public Skin Element site is the archived Shopify rebuild
definitionOfDone: Semantic index.html, styles.css, and minimal script.js implement the full site without a build system
Approved titles, dates, metrics, links, and claims remain accurate
Hero, summary, toolkit, skills, projects, experience, education, and contact are present without a visible PDF download option
The Skin Element experience claim remains explicitly identified as a completed, unreleased Shopify rebuild
Responsive behavior is verified at 1440px, 768px, and 375px with no horizontal overflow
Accessibility, link, asset, metadata, print, reduced-motion, and console checks pass
GitHub Pages project-path compatibility is verified
Verification evidence is recorded in the pull request and repository state files

implementation.assetStrategy: The premium text-led direction uses one official, high-resolution Pi8 product visual and two resolution-appropriate local brand marks across standardized project heroes. Provenance, dimensions, hashes, and usage constraints are recorded in assets/projects/README.md; no screenshots, placeholders, stock imagery, or generated imagery are included.

commands.evidence: Exited 0 with no output after the final implementation changes.
Local preview served at http://127.0.0.1:4173/; index, cache-versioned styles.css?v=20260714-5, script.js, project assets, and retained PDF returned HTTP 200.
114 authoritative source fragments and all 16 source links were found after adding Keanan's approved Pi8 featured-project claim; required relative asset references were present.
HTML validation completed with 0 errors and 0 warnings after the final markup fixes.
Both JavaScript files passed syntax checks.

Every non-hero font-size declaration is exactly 75% of the prior value, while every hero-name font-size declaration is exactly 50%. At 1440px this measured 15px body copy, 56px hero type, 43.5px section headings, 25.5px company/project headings, and 16.5px project evidence. At 1024px it measured 13.5px body copy, 48px hero type, 37.5px section headings, and 15px project evidence. Every viewport reported zero horizontal overflow or out-of-bounds elements, zero broken images, zero failed requests, and zero console warnings or errors.

Playwright 1.61.1 CLI screenshots completed for the revised 1440x1000 hero and 375x812 mobile hero. Both were visually reviewed; the exact proportional type reduction retained hierarchy, whole-word wrapping, and stable controls without overlap.

commands.command: GitHub Pages project-path simulation at /keanan-wilson-resume/ on temporary port 4174
commands.evidence: Page, cache-versioned styles.css?v=20260714-5, and script returned HTTP 200 under the project prefix; unchanged project and PDF asset paths remain project-path compatible.

commands.command: GitHub Pages production build and live Playwright verification
commands.evidence: PR #2 merged the exact proportional type scale to main as 4b2863ef84d7b37e447fd89215ee19b884cfdb2b. GitHub Pages build 1095220710 completed with status built and no error. Live Playwright at 1440, 1024, 768, 375, and 320px reproduced the requested 75% global and 50% hero sizes exactly with zero overflow, broken assets, failed requests, console warnings, or console errors.

commands.command: curl verification of recorded project-asset source URLs
commands.evidence: The official Bowers & Wilkins Pi8 product page and image URL returned HTTP 200. With an explicit image/webp Accept header, the official image response matched the committed 121,684-byte local asset and SHA-256 a0baf5730f8940b71c54c2bf7fcd7a65c25655016b447b2fbd3b19925177b1db; the previously verified Polk Audio and Angostura marks remain unchanged.

manualChecks: Keanan's requested proportional reduction is exact: all text is 25% smaller and the hero full name is 50% smaller. At 1440px, body copy is 15px, project evidence is 16.5px, section headings are 43.5px, company/project headings are 25.5px, and the hero name is 56px.
Featured Projects precedes Professional Experience in the DOM, primary navigation, hero index, section numbering, visual order, and print order.
The live GitHub Pages hero was captured at 1440x1000 and visually matched the verified local design with the final system typography and project-first navigation.
Keyboard Tab order begins with the visible skip link; skip activation transfers focus to Summary; all sampled focus outlines were solid and 3px.
Mobile menu opens, reports aria-expanded=true, closes on Escape, and returns focus to the Menu button.
Internal navigation lands below the sticky header; the final DOM contains no PDF links, download attributes, or visible download controls.
Sampled text contrast ranged from 5.88:1 to 14.73:1; reduced-motion media changed smooth scrolling to auto and reduced transitions to 0.01ms.

Print media rendered as a six-page Letter PDF 1.4 file after the proportional text reduction; all six rendered pages were visually inspected with Featured Projects before Professional Experience, black text, hidden navigation/footer controls, and no clipping or broken glyphs.
The approved PDF is a four-page PDF 1.4 file with SHA-256 e86a5b4d27a6ecad78401426823acd168e21b54defb6b736fb9757cd0e7e46d6.

The meaningful Pi8 product image uses concise alternative text; the Polk Audio and Angostura logo-only heroes remain decorative because adjacent H3 headings expose their names. The final DOM contains one H1, an ordered H1-H3 hierarchy, and no duplicate IDs.
The Skin Element is no longer a featured module, while its Professional Experience bullet remains unchanged and identifies the work as a completed, unreleased Shopify ecommerce rebuild.
limitations: Automated external-link requests returned HTTP 200 for the new Pi8 destination and previously returned HTTP 200 for 5 other authoritative destinations and HTTP 403 for 10 brand or Upwork destinations; no checked URL returned 404 or 410. The exact approved source links remain present.

The Polk wordmark is a high-resolution local asset whose original download metadata points to a third-party logo archive rather than an official media kit; the local and recorded online copies match by SHA-256. Replace it if Polk supplies an approved official press asset.
The proportional type-scale revision is deployed and verified on the public GitHub Pages URL.
Context Projection remains required and has not yet been completed or explicitly deferred with approval, so CU1 is launched but not claimed closed.

contextProjection.reason: A new public resume and portfolio site changes Keanan's public professional presence and adds a maintained LafaYeti repository.
evidence: PR #1 is merged to main at bcbe5c676db47abb64b954dff9a2552dba0302a7 and the public site is verified at https://lafayeti-dev.github.io/keanan-wilson-resume/.
Cross-repository projection has not yet been completed or explicitly deferred with approval; CU1 remains open for that final governance step.
